page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: ELECTOR EvaLuator of Error Correction Tools for lOng Reads
page_metadata.biotools__summary: ELECTOR (EvaLuation of Error Correction Tools for lOng Reads) is a program that enables the testing of different hybrid and non hybrid long read correction tools.
